MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Theresa Peace, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.; Arnold Walter Evje, counsel representing plaintiff

Dale Ludd and Bonnie Curry, defendants
Kavita Sharma, Esq. by limited scope representation of defendants

Settlement conference held. Parties enter into signed agreements, which are filed with the Court. See scanned documents for settlement terms contained in the signed agreements for premises located at 41 Jones Street, #609, San Francisco, California.

April 21, 2008 trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Ernst Halperin, Clerk Linda Fong, not reported (218)
